name: omniclaw
description: Google Workspace and YouTube MCP server for OpenClaw

client_secret_path.description: Absolute path to your client_secret.json from Google Cloud Console.

oauth_port.description: Local port for the OAuth callback server.

tokens_path.description: Path to store OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/omniclaw-tokens.json.

github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic or fine-grained). Required for GitHub tools.

gemini_api_key.description: Gemini API key from Google AI Studio. Required for image/video generation tools.

wolfram_appid.description: Wolfram Alpha AppID from the Wolfram Developer Portal. Required for computational knowledge tools.
